  - .cline/memory/lessons.md — 9 new typed entries prepended above existing 2026-05-23 entries:
    🔴 GOTCHAS (4):
      - [[xendit-internal-id-in-api-wire]] — provider correlation IDs (xendit_invoice_id, xendit_customer_id, etc.) MUST NOT appear in tRPC select clauses; security.md AGENT PROHIBITIONS #13 extended to all provider columns + audit-grep rule.
      - [[xendit-grace-sweeper-import-direction]] — shared constants between two BullMQ workers belong in the worker that OWNS the domain semantically, not the chronologically older one (GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS + addDaysUtc canonical in grace-sweeper.ts, imported by xendit-webhook.ts).
      - [[yelli-jobs-module-import-side-effect]] — importing @yelli/jobs triggers top-level BullMQ Queue construction; REDIS_URL must be stubbed in vitest.config.ts even for pure-function node-env tests.
      - [[eslint-import-order-multi-line-quirk]] — ESLint import-order auto-fix mangles multi-line destructured @yelli/db imports; use mixed-mode `import { type X, y, z }` syntax instead of separate `import type { X }` + `import { y, z }` lines.
    🟤 DECISIONS (7):
      - [[sonnet-effective-budget-20k]] — Sonnet 4.6 effective subagent budget is ~20K (not §1's theoretical 30K); 5 confirmed data points; PROPOSES amendment to memory-governance.md §1 Step 2.5 (apply on next governance edit).
      - [[opus-inline-escalation-pattern]] — when Sonnet thrash is anticipated (estimate ≥18K), Opus inline (~100K) is cheaper than Sonnet dispatch + Opus salvage (~150K).
      - [[existing-surface-scan-before-scaffold]] — 3-minute pre-flight grep before scoping work; pivots Tier 3 "build new" into Tier 1 "gap-find" when prior phases already shipped 80% (3c-i precedent — scoped Tier 3, executed Tier 1).
      - [[grace-period-init-on-webhook-not-cron]] — webhook initializes the deadline timestamp so UI banner has it immediately; cron only observes/transitions, never writes the deadline.
      - [[cron-idempotency-via-filter-shape]] — cron idempotency via filter shape (where status='X' AND deadline≤now exclude-by-construction), NOT via ProcessedJobEvent table; regression test pins the exact WHERE clause.
      - [[3c-ii-reorder-data-before-ui]] — when UI copy depends on a data field, ship data layer first even if original plan ordered UI first; end-state files identical, only session ordering changes.
      - [[vitest-in-apps-web-only]] — pure functions exported from packages/jobs/* (and similar packages without their own vitest setup) live in apps/web alongside related domain tests; revisit at ~10 test file threshold.
  - .cline/memory/agent-log.md — Item 3 close-out entry appended chronologically at line 571 (after Item 1 at 567 and Item 2 at 569).
  - .cline/STATE.md — this file, rewritten as final close-out state.

DEPLOYMENT CHECKLIST (Item 3 production rollout — required before exposing webhook route on production traffic):
□ Populate `XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` in `.env.staging` AND `.env.prod` from CREDENTIALS.md Section 4.5 (webhook handler has graceful 503 degradation when env var unset — dev/CI work fine without it, but production webhook route returns 503 "Webhook receiver not configured" until populated).
□ Run `prisma migrate deploy` on staging — applies both pending migrations together: `20260524100300_xendit_webhook_idempotency` (ProcessedWebhookEvent table) + `20260524140200_grace_period_suspension` (subscription_status enum extension + grace_period_end nullable timestamp column).
□ Run `prisma migrate deploy` on production after staging verification.
□ Configure Xendit dashboard webhook URL to point at `https://${prod_domain}/api/webhooks/xendit` AND set the same `XENDIT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` value in Xendit dashboard's webhook configuration (Xendit signs every callback with this token via the `x-callback-token` header; the route handler does constant-time verify via crypto.timingSafeEqual).
□ Verify grace-sweeper cron is registered in production BullMQ (registerCronJobs picks it up automatically at app boot; pattern '0 */6 * * *' = every 6 hours; first sweep transitions any past_due Subscription rows past their grace_period_end to suspended).
□ Smoke-test the full flow against Xendit test mode: create checkout → simulate invoice.paid → verify subscription.status='active' + ProcessedWebhookEvent row created + AuditLog entry with PLATFORM:INVOICE_PAID. Repeat with invoice.expired → past_due + grace_period_end=now+7d + banner appears on /app and /admin. Manually backdate grace_period_end to past → wait one cron tick → verify suspended state + free-tier downgrade + AuditLog entry with PLATFORM:GRACE_PERIOD_EXPIRED.
